use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in dashboard layouts and sidebar navigation
Showing user avatars with status indicators in notification and message panels
Representing users in card components such as testimonials, reviews, or team member listings
Providing visual identification in comment sections and forum discussions
Displaying user avatars with online/offline/busy/away status in chat interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile user avatar component built with Radix UI primitives featuring image, fallback, indicator, and status sub-components. Supports four status variants (online, offline, busy, away) with small circular indicators. Uses Tailwind for minimalist flat styling with rounded-full design and border utilities. Designed for universal use across SaaS dashboards, e-commerce platforms, and social applications where user identity representation is needed.
